calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher C. Carin, for Petitioner James W. Hays (via Zoom).
James W. Hays, Petitioner, present in court.
Mishelle Keverline and Julie Hartung, notified heirs, appeared via Zoom.

The court inquired about a Comerica Bank account that was opened shortly before Mrs. Hays' death. Mr. Carin explained that the funds were withdrawn from a joint Wells Fargo account by Mrs. Hays during a mental health episode and deposited into the Comerica account without Mr. Hays' name. Mr. Hays and his counsel, Mr. Carin, confirmed that the Comerica account contained community property savings primarily funded by his earnings.

Mr. Carin clarified to the notified heirs that notice was provided to them pursuant to statutory requirements and that, since the account is community property, they would not inherit under the statute.

The court takes the matter under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Deputy: Singh; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Continued To Nov-25-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
